Landing.heroTitle: Last-minute interview? Still ship a solid script.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Compliant prep before the interview: parse the JD, refine answers, export. Not live cheating in the room.
Landing.pricingBody: Per-parse JD, quarterly plans, etc. Final pricing at launch.
Landing.shareBody: Share on social or invite friends to unlock extra JD parses (rules wiring later).

thinkingSteps: Cross-checking JD keywords with your resume…
Marking overlaps and gaps vs the JD…
Aligning with your question mix settings…
Workspace.matchDisclaimer: Model-estimated from text only; not the employer’s view. For prep reference.
Workspace.placeholderChat: Pick a question on the left to chat with AI. Set GEMINI_API_KEY in web/.env or web/.env.local.
Workspace.selectQuestion: Select a question on the left
Workspace.apiKeyMissing: GEMINI_API_KEY missing or empty: use one line GEMINI_API_KEY=yourkey in web/.env (no line break after =), save, restart dev. Open /api/ai/health for diagnostics.

Projects.title: My interview scripts
Projects.subtitle: One project per JD. MVP uses a placeholder list.
